name: Knight
flavor: Realms at War — new archetype. Well-armoured heavy horse with a devastating charge, but over-committed (lower Vigour). Playtest the +1 reroll; drop it if the charge feels too strong.

specialAction.name: Lance Charge
specialAction.summary: Make a straight-line Move as far as the fully-stretched cord allows, then immediately make 1 Attack with +1 reroll. The charge is your whole action for the turn.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, make 1 Move after this Attack (ride them down).
